title: deinandra frutescens
intro: Deinandra frutescens, also known as Newleaf or Island Yarrow, is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of California and Oregon in the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Deinandra frutescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Deinandra frutescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies and supplements to promote overall well-being.
